message:
Add GitHub Actions CI: build, test, and benchmark

- test job: zig build → wasm-opt → bun build → 624 tests
- benchmark job: parse/stream benchmarks + AI SDK comparison
- Runs on push/PR to main

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: bun run build
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: bun run test
+
+  benchmark:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: test
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: bun run build
+
+      - name: Benchmark — Parse & Stream
+        run: bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs
+
+      - name: Benchmark — AI SDK Comparison
+        run: cd bench/ai-parsers && bun install && bun --expose-gc bench.mjs
